task_completion.description: Open the flight plan creation screen or menu in the Avare app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Plan' tab, 'Route' screen, or flight plan interface is visible in the Avare app.

task_completion.description: Search for or input the departure airport (KSFO).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KSFO' is typed into a search bar, waypoint entry field, or selected on the map.

task_completion.description: Add KSFO as the starting waypoint of the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'KSFO' appears as the first entry in the active flight plan list or route sequence.

task_completion.description: Search for or input the destination airport (KLAX).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KLAX' is typed into a search bar, waypoint entry field, or selected on the map.

task_completion.description: Add KLAX as the destination waypoint to complete the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'KLAX' appears as the final entry in the active flight plan list following 'KSFO', or the map displays an active route line connecting KSFO to KLAX.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Avare app's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare app interface being used, rather than a text editor, web browser, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open executing commands to inject flight plan data directly into the app's database.

integrity.description: The flight plan was genuinely created in the app's routing system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waypoints are shown in the actual flight plan list or drawn as a route on the map, not just typed as a single string (e.g., 'KSFO to KLAX') into a generic search bar without executing the plan.

privileged_info_for_vlm: KSFO is the ICAO code for San Francisco International Airport (Departure). KLAX is the ICAO code for Los Angeles International Airport (Destination). The VLM should look for these exact ICAO codes (KSFO and KLAX) in the Avare app's flight plan interface.
